title: United Kingdom bans social media for under 16s
summary: The British government implements a ban preventing under-16s from accessing platforms like TikTok and YouTube, aiming to protect their mental health.

title: US government bans advanced Anthropic models
summary: The US administration blocks Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models, sparking industry criticism and debate on technological sovereignty.

title: Fox acquires Roku for $22 billion
summary: Media conglomerate Fox buys streaming platform Roku, consolidating the online television market.

title: Salesforce buys customer service platform Fin for $3.6 billion
summary: The acquisition of Fin (formerly Intercom) strengthens Salesforce's AI capabilities for customer service.

title: Orbio raises $21 million to automate hiring with AI
summary: The Madrid-based startup uses artificial intelligence to conduct job interviews and expands its business after funding.

title: Spain will debut in the World Cup against Cape Verde
summary: The Spanish national team faces Cape Verde in its first match of the 2026 World Cup.

title: Vodafone reduces roaming prices for summer 2026
summary: The operator offers cheaper rates for data usage abroad during the summer season.

title: AI industry faces layoffs and bubble signals
summary: Reports indicate a wave of job cuts in AI companies and warnings of a possible bubble in the sector.

title: Nvidia issues $20 billion in bonds to finance AI
summary: The chip company turns to the debt market to raise capital for its AI expansion.

title: SpaceX hits record IPO of $85.7 billion
summary: Elon Musk's space company makes the largest initial public offering in its history.

title: Fei-Fei Li launches World Labs, an AI company valued at $1 billion
summary: The renowned researcher founds a new AI company with a valuation of $1 billion.

title: Microsoft CEO warns about concentration of AI benefits
summary: Satya Nadella warns that a small number of AI systems could capture all economic returns.

title: Critical vulnerability in Microsoft 365 Copilot allows theft of emails and files
summary: A security flaw in Microsoft 365 Copilot could have allowed attackers to access sensitive information and MFA codes.

title: Palo Alto warns of active exploitation of a vulnerability in GlobalProtect VPN
summary: The security company reports that a flaw in PAN-OS GlobalProtect is being actively used by attackers.

title: Meta develops facial recognition for its glasses with a Pentagon supplier
summary: Zuckerberg's company works on facial recognition prototypes for its smart glasses in collaboration with a military contractor.

title: Sarvam becomes India's new AI unicorn with $234 million
summary: The Indian AI startup reaches a valuation of over $1 billion after a round led by HCLTech.

title: Copper-transporting drug restores memory and removes Alzheimer's toxic proteins
summary: Scientists discover that a copper-transporting drug can reverse memory loss and clear Alzheimer's-associated proteins.

title: AMD does not pay promised bounty to security researcher
summary: The company does not deliver the $10,000 offered for discovering a vulnerability in its update software.

title: Nintendo imposes measures against Switch 2 resellers
summary: The company requires at least 50 hours played on Switch and limits one console per account to combat resale.

title: Apple updates App Store rules to remove outdated or low-quality apps
summary: The company reviews its guidelines to maintain the quality of the app store by removing outdated apps.
